projects.name: raspimidihub
projects.description: RaspiMIDIHub — Turn your Raspberry Pi into a plug-and-play USB MIDI hub. Automatic all-to-all routing with hotplug support, per-connection channel filtering and MIDI mapping, mobile-first web UI via built-in WiFi access point, read-only filesystem for power-safe operation. Zero dependencies, zero configuration — just plug in and play.
